messages:
## 当前仓库顶层目录和文件（简单分组）

### 📁 目录
.cargo/, .git/, .pids/, .vscode/, UI/, configs/, crates/, data/, docker/, docs/, document/, external_skills/, image/, logs/, migrations/, node_modules/, patches/, pi_app/, plan/, plans/, prompts/, run/, scripts/, services/, skill_develop/, skills_output/, systemd/, target/, tmp/

### 📄 配置文件
Cargo.toml, Cargo.lock, .env.example, docker-compose.yml, .gitignore, .dockerignore, package.json, package-lock.json

### 📖 文档
README.md, README.zh-CN.md, README_cn.md, LICENSE, LICENSE.zh-CN.md, RUSTCLAW_SERVICE_README.md, USAGE.md, AGENTS.md, failed-routing-cases.md, memory-usage-plan.md, path_note.txt, pwd_report.txt

### 🖼️ 图片
RustClaw.png, RustClaw480X320.png, longxia.png

### 📜 Shell 脚本
build-all.sh, build-ui-nginx.sh, check-logs.sh, cross-build-upload-cloud.sh, cross-build-upload.sh, git-add-exclude.sh, install-rustclaw-cmd.sh, local-cross-build-upload-pi.sh, pack-to-parent.sh, package-release.sh, push-sanitized-configs.sh, setup-config.sh, simulate-telegramd.sh, start-all-bin.sh, start-all.sh, start-clawd-ui.sh, start-clawd.sh, start-feishud.sh, start-future-adapters.sh, start-larkd.sh, start-telegramd.sh, start-wa-web-bridge.sh, start-wechatd.sh, start-whatsapp-webd.sh, start-whatsappd.sh, stop-rustclaw.sh, system_report.sh, uninstall-rustclaw-cmd.sh

### ⚙️ 其他
rustclaw（二进制）, rustclaw.service（服务文件）, test_contract.sqlite（测试数据库）
